meta.license: Unsplash License (free for commercial use, no attribution required but appreciated)
meta.notes: All images sourced from Unsplash. Direct URLs use w=1200&q=80 for high-quality web display. Replace with actual product photography when available.

images.description: Brown glass essential oil bottle with dropper on a wooden table with candles — warm spa atmosphere with amber tones, wooden textures, and soft candlelight creating an intimate apothecary feel
images.whyChosen: Warm candlelit ambiance with amber glass bottle on wooden surface perfectly captures the Sacred Apothecary aesthetic. Natural materials and warm lighting.

images.description: Brown glass bottle on a beige wooden surface — minimal, warm essential oil bottle with soft natural lighting and earthy neutral background
images.whyChosen: Clean, minimal composition with an amber glass bottle on warm beige wood. Feels refined and premium without being clinical. Perfect for a facial oil product card.

images.description: Natural cosmetics set with moisturizing cream in eco-friendly bamboo jar and serum in dropper bottle — organic skincare product packaging on neutral background
images.whyChosen: Eco-friendly bamboo jar with natural, organic aesthetic. Clean packaging design with earth-tone materials matches the artisanal skincare brand positioning.

images.description: Green powder on a spoon — earthy matcha/clay powder in a flat-lay composition with natural green tones, suitable as a visual stand-in for a green clay face masque
images.whyChosen: Rich green powder evokes clay/botanical masque ingredients. Earthy, natural tone with organic texture feels authentic to a handcrafted skincare masque.

images.description: Person holding an amber glass bottle — close-up of hands with an essential oil or serum bottle, warm dark tones with soft lighting suggesting an intimate skincare ritual
images.whyChosen: Hands holding an amber bottle captures the intimate, ritualistic aspect of skincare. Warm, moody lighting with dark tones feels sacred and intentional — core to the brand narrative.

images.description: Essential oil bottles with dried lavender and amethyst crystals on a table — botanical flat-lay arrangement with warm, earthy purple and amber tones
images.whyChosen: Beautiful arrangement of essential oil bottles, dried lavender, and amethyst on a warm surface. Botanical ingredients plus crystal elements feel premium, natural, and aligned with the sacred apothecary theme.

images.description: A white candle on a table next to a woven basket — warm, calming wellness scene with soft natural tones evoking self-care and relaxation
images.whyChosen: Warm, minimal self-care scene with candle and woven textures. Calming and grounded — perfect for a wellness journal post about rituals and intention.

images.description: Amber glass spray bottle, homemade soap, and moisturizer cream on a wooden board with green leaves — top-view arrangement of natural organic beauty products and raw ingredients
images.whyChosen: Top-down view of natural ingredients and products on warm wood with green botanical elements. Shows raw, organic materials that communicate ingredient transparency and natural formulation.

images.description: Amber glass cosmetic bottles set with monstera leaf on green background — natural organic beauty products packaging arrangement without labels
images.whyChosen: Multiple amber glass bottles in a clean arrangement with botanical elements. Works well as an alternate hero or product collection overview. Label-free bottles allow the viewer to project the brand onto them.

images.description: Amber glass bottles with essential oils in warm light — multiple brown glass bottles suggesting an apothecary collection with soft, warm reflections
images.whyChosen: Collection of amber glass bottles evoking an apothecary shelf. Warm, dark tones with essential oil bottles feel artisanal and craft-focused — perfect for telling the brand story.

images.description: Serum being poured from a dropper bottle — golden hour close-up of skincare serum with warm, luminous drops
images.whyChosen: Close-up of golden serum being dispensed from a dropper. Golden hour lighting creates a warm, luminous quality that highlights product texture and feels luxurious.
